nameEn: Hunting, trapping and related service activities
description: This class includes hunting and trapping on a commercial basis; taking of animals (dead or alive) for food, fur, skin, or for use in research, in zoos or as pets; producing fur skins, reptile or bird skins from hunting or trapping activities.
includes: hunting and trapping on a commercial basis
taking of animals (dead or alive) for food, fur, skin or for use in research, in zoos or as pets
producing fur skins, reptile or bird skins from hunting or trapping activities
land-based catching of sea mammals such as walrus and seal
excludes: production of fur skins, reptile or bird skins from ranching operations, see 014
raising of game animals on ranching operations, see 014
production of hides and skins originating from slaughterhouses, see 1010
hunting for sport or recreation and related service activities, see 9319
service activities to promote hunting and trapping, see 9499
